sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86399" key="pri/w1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρίω</orth>, imper. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπριάμην,</foreign> <sense id="n86399.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Πρίαμαι.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
